_comment: The Brief agents are integrated into the main OpenClaw gateway. This file is for reference only.

gateway.note: Agents are accessed via the main gateway at http://127.0.0.1:18789

brief-curator.name: The Brief — Curator
brief-curator.role: Scout and validator. Finds signals and validates content quality.

brief-assignment.name: The Brief — Assignment Editor
brief-assignment.role: Scout. Finds signals and commissions pieces.

brief-managing.name: The Brief — Managing Editor
brief-managing.role: Maker. Develops ideas into clarity and beauty.

brief-editorial.name: The Brief — Editorial Director
brief-editorial.role: Visionary. Makes publication decisions and guards vision.
